projects.title: Stock Multi-Agent Financial Analyzer
projects.description: Financial analysis platform combining an LLM Gateway with Playwright browser automation. Multi-agent collaboration across news, finance, trader, and data agents with Safety Guard and full artifact traceability.
highlights: Built a modular multi-agent system with 4 specialized agents (news, finance, trader, data) orchestrated via a central LLM Gateway
Implemented 5-layer Safety Guard including prompt injection defense, hallucination detection, and structured output validation
Integrated Playwright for real-time web scraping of financial news, earnings reports, and live market data
Designed full artifact traceability: every agent decision, tool call, and intermediate result is logged and auditable
projects.outcome: Reduced financial research turnaround time by ~70% while maintaining complete auditability across all AI-generated insights and trading signals.

projects.title: Maritime High-Risk & Anomaly Prediction
projects.description: Integrated national weather, vessel static data, and real-time AIS streams into ClickHouse and deep learning to predict grounding and anomalous behaviors and help prevent maritime incidents.
highlights: Fused 15+ heterogeneous data sources: national weather API, real-time AIS streams, vessel static registry, and port schedules
Built a real-time streaming pipeline with ClickHouse columnar storage, ingesting and querying 20TB+ of vessel movement history
Trained deep learning models to detect grounding risk and anomalous navigation patterns with high precision
Deployed entirely on-premises to comply with government maritime authority data sovereignty requirements
projects.outcome: Delivered an early-warning system for high-risk vessel behaviors, actively supporting government maritime safety operations and reducing incident response time.

projects.title: Disrupted Time-Series Forecasting
projects.description: Compared SARIMA, Holt-Winters, and Prophet under COVID-19 disruptions. Designed three experimental groups to quantify the impact of external shocks on time-series forecasting accuracy.
projects.role: Data Scientist (Academic Research · University of Mannheim)
highlights: Designed 3 experimental groups — pre-COVID baseline, during-disruption, and post-disruption recovery — for rigorous model comparison
Evaluated SARIMA, Holt-Winters, and Prophet across multiple real-world datasets under external shock conditions
Quantified accuracy degradation using RMSE and MAPE metrics, isolating the effect of structural breaks on each model
Conducted as graduate-level research at University of Mannheim, Germany
projects.outcome: Findings showed Prophet's superior resilience during disruption while SARIMA demonstrated stronger accuracy during the post-pandemic recovery phase.

projects.title: Slot Game Engine & Probability Optimizer
projects.description: 3×3 slot game engine combining Monte Carlo simulation with heuristic search to auto-optimize reel configurations under RTP 95% and win rate ≥55% constraints. Full-stack with FastAPI backend and React frontend.
highlights: Engineered a complete 3×3 slot game engine with configurable reel symbols, pay tables, and 5 distinct win patterns
Implemented Monte Carlo simulation (100K iterations) combined with heuristic search to auto-optimize reel strip configurations
Enforced dual constraints simultaneously: Return-to-Player (RTP) ≥ 95% and player win rate ≥ 55%
Built a full-stack interface with FastAPI backend and React frontend for real-time RTP visualization and simulation control
projects.outcome: Automated the reel optimization process, reducing configuration time from days of manual calculation to minutes of automated search.

projects.title: AutoLLM — No-Code RAG Chatbot Platform
projects.description: Production-grade RAG platform with document upload, vector retrieval, multi-LLM switching, dual-layer Redis + PostgreSQL storage, and Docker microservice deployment.
highlights: Designed a no-code RAG platform enabling non-technical users to build domain-specific chatbots by simply uploading documents
Built a dual-layer storage architecture: pgvector for semantic retrieval and Redis for session caching and conversation history
Implemented dynamic LLM provider switching across OpenAI, Gemini, and Claude via a unified API abstraction layer
Containerized all 5 microservices with Docker Compose for one-command deployment and horizontal scalability
projects.outcome: Reduced chatbot deployment time from weeks to hours for non-technical teams, with 15+ production-ready API endpoints and multi-tenant document isolation.

steps.title: Consulting

steps.description: In-depth stakeholder interviews to capture detailed functional and technical requirements.

steps.title: Requirements Specification
steps.description: Formalize requirements into a comprehensive specification document with acceptance criteria and project scope.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: Agile development with iterative delivery, continuous testing, and regular progress reviews.

steps.title: Final Analysis Report
steps.description: Comprehensive project closure report with performance metrics, insights, and recommendations for future optimization.
